records.ety: [OE. limnen, fr. luminen, for enluminen, F. enluminer to illuminate, to limn, LL. illuminare to paint. √122. See Illuminate, Luminous.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Limned (lmd); p. pr. & vb. n. Limning (lm"nng lm"ng).]

defs: To draw or paint; especially, to represent in an artistic way with pencil or brush.
quotes: Let a painter carelessly limn out a million of faces, and you shall find them all different.

defs: To picture in words; to describe in graphic terms.
To illumine, as books or parchments, with ornamental figures, letters, or borders.
